provisions.title: Citation and commencement
provisions.content: (1) These Regulations may be cited as the Petroleum (Imposition of Petroleum Fees) Regulations, 2021. (2) These Regulations shall come into operation on the 1 st day of July, 2021.

provisions.title: Imposition and collection of petroleum fee
provisions.content: There shall be imposed a petroleum fee at the rate specified in the Schedule to these Regulations which shall be collected by the Tanzania Revenue Authority.

provisions.title: Usage of petroleum fee
provisions.content: The petroleum fee collected under these Regulations shall be remitted to the Rural Energy Agency and shall be used for Rural Electrification Projects.

provisions.title: Revocation of GN No. 231 of 2013
provisions.content: The Petroleum (Imposition of Petroleum Fee) Regulations, 2013 are hereby revoked. Schedule (Made under regulation 2) S/N Type of petroleum product Petroleum fee in Tshs per litre Petroleum levy in Tshs per litre 1. Diesel 50 50 2. Petrol 50 50 3.
